feedback.text: Single player games should never be deleted from a library because the market that you bought it from does not support it any more. You bought it and you have the rights to play it for ever like the physical copies. For multiplayer game you should at least given the files and guide to launch you own server. On both types of games they should allow you to at least mod the game for fixes and new content. All of those are not something that will cost the publisher anything or at least the bare minimum.
